name: NyxID Credential Broker
description: OAuth login to NyxID and delegated access to user-connected services

clientId.description: OAuth client ID from the NyxID developer portal

clientSecret.description: OAuth client secret. Required for delegated proxy token exchange.

defaultScopes.description: Scopes requested during the NyxID login flow

delegationScopes.description: Scopes requested during RFC 8693 token exchange
